headings.usage: H1: text-5xl md:text-7xl font-extrabold tracking-tighter uppercase; H2: text-3xl md:text-5xl font-extrabold tracking-tighter; Subheadings: text-xs tracking-[0.2em] uppercase font-bold text-gray-500

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing, Optical Clarity, Strict Grids. Never center-align. Break symmetry.

grid_system.bento_marketing: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8. Heavy reliance on 1px solid borders to expose the grid.
grid_system.pricing_cards: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-0. Border collapse style (no gaps, just 1px borders between columns).
grid_system.borders: Expose the skeleton. border-t border-b border-l border-r border-[#E5E5E5].

hero.structure: Asymmetric text on the left (spanning 8 columns), abstract structural image on the right or spanning full width with overlay.
hero.heading: Massive text. 'Z-DIGITAL SOLUTIONS'. Tracking-tighter.
hero.cta: Flat background (#050505), crisp square edges, no radius. Hover: Background #FF3300, text #FFFFFF.

navigation.structure: Sticky header (z-50). Solid white background (#FFFFFF) with a 1px solid bottom border (#E5E5E5). No glassmorphism for this Swiss archetype.
navigation.links: IBM Plex Sans, text-sm, uppercase, tracking-[0.1em].
navigation.cta: Square button, flat black background, white text.

pricing.structure: 3-column grid. Pure HTML/Tailwind. No Shadcn 'Card' (avoid generic look).
pricing.style: Strict tabular look. 1px borders separating tiers. Hover: Lifts -translate-y-1, adds sharp shadow (shadow-[4px_4px_0_#050505]).

portfolio.structure: Bento Grid layout (Mode A). Wide gaps. Mix of large, tall, and square items.
portfolio.image_treatment: Grayscale by default (saturate-0). Full color on hover (saturate-100 transition-all).

contact_form.structure: Strictly functional layout. Shadcn Input, Textarea, Button (heavily customized to be square, flat, with 1px border).
contact_form.integration: Submit to backend -> Email via Resend. Trigger success toast (Sonner) on completion.

footer.structure: Massive py-32 space. Dark mode inversion: bg-[#050505] text-[#F9F9F9].
footer.heading: Colossal text for 'LET'S TALK' (text-[10vw]).

motion_and_interaction.hover: Instant or fast transitions (0.15s). Technical and snappy.
motion_and_interaction.buttons: Hover changes to Accent color (#FF3300) or adds a sharp, non-blurred drop shadow (shadow-[4px_4px_0px_rgba(5,5,5,1)]).

hero_abstract.description: Close-up of a modern white architectural facade with geometric patterns and sharp lines.
Black and white photo of a white building

services_icons.description: Geometric lines, to be used as abstract texture behind services

testing.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid="pricing-one-page-cta"`).

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and configure Lenis for smooth scrolling.
Implement Sonner for toast notifications on contact form submission.
Ensure all buttons and inputs are completely square (rounded-none).
Use Phosphor Icons (yarn add @phosphor-icons/react) for clean, geometric iconography.
Implement pure HTML/Tailwind grids with `border-collapse` style for the pricing section. Do not use standard Shadcn Cards here.
Ensure the contact form logic submits data and uses Resend for email notifications (mock if API keys missing, but build the structure).
Typography MUST use Cabinet Grotesk (headings) and IBM Plex Sans (body). Do NOT default to Inter.
Stick strictly to the monochromatic palette (#F9F9F9, #FFFFFF, #050505) with ONLY the Signal Red (#FF3300) as the CTA accent.
